heading: Omitted
label: 500d Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which empowered Secretary to receive and expand loans, grants, or allocations for purposes of this subchapter, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Sept. 1, 1937, ch. 897, § 550 Stat. 900
